title: Nemetona
description: Nemetona is a very WIP mod based around nature, created for Mod Garden 2025
body:
# Welcome to Nemetona!
---
Nemetona is a new mod based around The Roots, a brand new (WIP) Dimension for Minecraft hanging over the Void. This biome is full of alien plants and strange creatures posing as new threats. Right now this is very heavily a WIP as it was created for Mod Garden 2025, however updates will slowly come to help polish things. 

If you do want to give this mod a try, I would advise using Creative for Version 1.0
